metadata.title: Heptodonta pulchella
metadata.description:
137. Heptodonta pulchella (Hope, 1831)

Records. NORTHEAST: Yen Bai, Yen Bai, Thac Ba LaKe suRR., vii.2022, 2 MaLes, LeG. V. DanG, 1 feMaLe (CKCE); Yen Bai, Mu CanG Chai, 1800–2100 M, iv.2022, LocaL coLLectoRs, 1 feMaLe (ABIC). SOUTH CENTRAL COAST: QuanG NaM, Axan Mts., 1300 M, Tay GianG distR., LocaL coLLectoR, v.2017, 2 feMaLes (CKCE).

Remarks. FiRst RecoRds foR Yen Bai and QuanG NaM pRovinces.
